title: Built in Logic in Form Builiding
excerpt: I would like the ability to have more robust forms and have more logic built into the forms. one example im looking to do, is based off of a series of dropdown questions in the , i want the form to fill in on a board and…

posts.author: mreasor (Mckenzie Reasor)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like the ability to have more robust forms and have more logic built into the forms. one example im looking to do, is based off of a series of dropdown questions in the , i want the form to fill in on a board and automatically choose a category from a dropdown column with what the form results best match the category.
